title: A Commentary Critical, Experimental, and Practical on the Old and New Testaments
author: Robert Jamieson, Andrew R. Fausset, and David Brown
tradition_notes: Jamieson was a Free Church of Scotland minister; Fausset an Anglican evangelical; Brown a Free Church of Scotland professor. The commentary reflects broadly Reformed evangelical scholarship. Interdenominational in spirit despite the Presbyterian institutional affiliations.
notes: All three authors died before 1928 -- text is public domain in all jurisdictions. HelloAO marks this PDM 1.0. Coverage: 66 books (full Bible).
